data.caption: Table 1. Performance on the Kodak dataset measured as area under the curve (AUC) for the specified metric, up to 2 bits per pixel. All models are trained up for approximately 1,000,000 training steps. No entropy coding was used. After entropy coding, the AUC will be higher for the network-based approaches.
